Exceptional Dental Care, Genuine Compassion

We expertly ease patient anxieties with every visit, providing a comfortable and welcoming experience for your entire family.

Schedule Your Visit

Your Comfort is Our Priority

At Surya Dental Care, we believe that a visit to the dentist should be a positive and stress-free experience. Led by the acclaimed Drs. Nehla and Senthil, our dedicated team combines professionalism with a genuinely compassionate approach to care.

From the moment you walk in, you'll notice our immaculate and calm clinic environment, designed to put you at ease. We are committed to punctual appointments, clear communication, and personalized treatment plans, ensuring you are well-informed and comfortable throughout your journey with us.

Explore Our Services

Comprehensive Dental Solutions

We offer a wide range of services to meet all your dental needs, using modern technology for meticulous and effective treatment.

Routine Cleanings & Exams

Preventive care to maintain your oral health and catch potential issues early.

Dental Implants

A permanent and natural-looking solution for replacing missing teeth.

Cosmetic Dentistry

Enhance your smile with services like teeth whitening, veneers, and bonding.

Personalized Consultations

We take the time to listen to your concerns and create a tailored treatment plan.

Family Dentistry

Gentle and friendly care for patients of all ages, from children to seniors.

Emergency Care

Prompt and compassionate care when you need it most.

Easing Dental Anxiety

We understand that dental visits can be stressful. Our team is dedicated to creating a comforting and attentive atmosphere, ensuring your experience is as relaxed and pain-free as possible.

Punctual & Professional

Your time is valuable. We pride ourselves on punctual appointments and a smooth, well-organized patient journey. Our professional staff ensures you are always well-informed and cared for.

What Our Patients Say

We are proud to have earned the trust of our community. Here’s what some of our patients have to share.

Usha S

Mahalakshmi
